creator: utisoft@googlemail.com
text:
Yeah, I'm really sorry about the multiple mess-ups.

I'm CCing to GNATS for the record, but gmail messes up attachments;
I'm on a dynamic IP temporarily and can't use it with sendmail!

Chris

2009/7/29 Martin Wilke <miwi@freebsd.org>:

A: Because it messes up the order in which people normally read text.
Q: Why is top-posting such a bad thing?
A: Top-posting.
Q: What is the most annoying thing in a mailing list?
